At max Starlium, Kimmy's Basic Attacks are enhanced to deal (+27%% Total Physical Attack) (+32%% Total Magic Power) damage and pierce through targets. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Endless Shards
abilities.description: Burst Aamon throws all shards at a designated enemy and slows them by 30% for 1.5 seconds. After a short delay, the shards will fly to the enemy's location again, each dealing 90–110 (+24% Total Magic Power) –150–180 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . The number of shards increases with Aamon's armor charges and the shards on the ground (8-25). The damage dealt increases with the target's lost HP , to the maximum when the target's HP is below 30%. The same target takes [50%] less damage from subsequent attacks. Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Lost HP Lost HP = Max HP - Current HP.

name: Valentina
intro: Valentina, the Prophetess of the Night, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Primal Force
abilities.description: Buff Heal Valentina gains 8–50 extra EXP each time she deals damage to an enemy hero. Cooldown: 2 seconds. If the enemy hero's level isn't higher than Valentina's, 30% of the damage dealt is converted into her HP . The EXP scales with Valentina's level.

abilities.name: Shadow Strike
abilities.description: Damage CC Valentina casts Shadow Strike in the target direction, dealing 340–665 (+185% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 40% for 1 second. Enemy heroes hit by Shadow Strike are marked with a Shadow Sigil for 4 seconds and will be terrified for 1s when hit by Shadow Strike again within the duration (a unit can only be terrified once within 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Arcane Shade
abilities.description: Mobility Buff Valentina dashes in the target direction, firing 3 Shadow Bolts at nearby enemies that deal 125–225 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage each. Valentina can cast this skill again within 6s (costs Mana ). The cooldown of Shadow Strike is reduced by 1 second each time a Shadow Bolt hits an enemy.

abilities.name: I Am You
abilities.description: Morph Slow Valentina slows the target enemy hero by 70% for 0.5 seconds and gains the ability to cast their Ultimate . Casting the enemy's Ultimate turns Valentina into the enemy hero's form and allows her to inherit their Basic Attack type for up to 12 seconds. Her regular skills remain unchanged, unless the enemy's Ultimate has a Morph effect. The stolen Ultimate's level will be equal to Valentina's level and the cooldown will be 120%–100% of the target's cooldown (but not lower than 10 seconds). Valentina gains (+100% Total Magic Power) Physical Attack for the duration if the enemy is a Physical Damage hero. This cannot be used on an enemy Valentina. Skill terms Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Physical ATK Total current Physical ATK. Healing Effect The actual ratio of self HP Regen caused to shield values. The default is 100%. Actual Value = Original Value × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × ...

name: Edith
intro: Edith, the Ancient Guard, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Phylax.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Buff After each skill cast, Edith and Phylax become Overloaded for 3 seconds, during which all Basic Attacks will trigger chain lightning, dealing extra Magic Damage equal to (+30% Total Magic Power) (+target's 4–8% Total HP) to up to 4 enemies. Chain lightning damage against Minions is increased to 150%. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Primal Wrath
abilities.description: Morph Buff Passive : When inside Phylax, Edith can accumulate Wrath according to the damage she receives (calculated before damage reduction ). Active : Edith ejects herself forward from Phylax, knocking back nearby enemies. After that, she takes flight and can perform ranged Basic Attacks , each dealing 35–65 (+75% Total Physical Attack) (+25% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . Edith also gains new skills in this state. When in flight, Edith gains 350–650 (+5% Total HP) –350–650 (+20% Total HP) extra Shield , 50%–150% extra Attack Speed and 5%-20% Hybrid Lifesteal based on Wrath she accumulated, and converts each point of Extra Physical Defense and Extra Magic Defense into 3.5 Magic Power . The Flight state lasts up to 8–12 seconds. Skill terms Magic Basic Attack Deal Magic DMG to enemies. It can trigger ATK Effect and Magic Lifesteal. Attack Speed Current Attack Speed = Base Attack Speed + Extra Attack Speed × Attack Speed Ratio. The current total Attack Speed determines the number of attacks per second (capped at 3 attacks per second). Hybrid Lifesteal Lifesteal (Basic Attacks) + Spell Vamp (Skills).

name: Floryn
intro: Floryn, the Budding Hope, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Dew.

abilities.name: Dew
abilities.description: Buff Dew's Lantern will permanently increase Floryn's attributes by a small amount. After leaving combat for 5 seconds, Floryn can share the Flower of Hope with an allied hero (30 seconds cooldown ), which will grant them a 100 (+70% Total Magic Power) shield each time they are healed by Floryn. Floryn will never sell the Lantern.

abilities.name: Sow
abilities.description: Damage Heal Floryn tosses an Energy Seed at a target enemy, dealing 180–330 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . Healing Fruits will then spawn and bounce to nearby allied heroes, restoring their by 175–225 (+90% Total Magic Power) .

abilities.name: Sprout
abilities.description: CC Damage Floryn casts a blob of energy ahead that explodes upon hitting an enemy, dealing 175–350 (+90% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies and stunning them for 0.5 seconds (and revealing their positions briefly). [ duration needed ] Skill terms Stun Basic level Crowd Control: Prevents a target from moving, and using Basic Attacks and skills. Can interrupt some skills.

abilities.name: Bloom
abilities.description: Heal Floryn resonates with Dew's power, recovering 250–450 (+100% Total Magic Power) HP to all allied heroes 2 times no matter where they are. This effect also increases their Shield and HP Regen effects by 12% for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Share
abilities.description: Floryn shares the Lantern 's power with an allied hero, slightly increasing their attributes.

name: Yin
intro: Yin, the Martial Genius, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Leave It to Me
abilities.description: Buff If there are no nearby allies within 4 units, Yin's damage is increased to 120% and gains 8% Spell Vamp .

abilities.name: My Turn
abilities.description: CC Buff After a short delay Yin pulls an enemy (excluding pets and clones ) into his domain for up to 8 seconds and turns into Lieh . When in the domain, the two cannot be affected by other heroes' skills. Lieh has stronger skills and gains 50-80 Physical & Magic Defense that lasts for 8 seconds. The domain will end early if any of the two hero is killed. If Lieh successfully kills the enemy, he'll restore 20% Max HP , leave the domain with the cooldowns of Frenzy Strike and Instant Blast Instant Blast reset, and continue to fight as Lieh for 8 seconds. If Yin fails to pull his target into his domain, the skill will enter a 3 second cooldown. Skill terms Physical Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Forsaken Light
abilities.description: Since there are other Forsaken Light members on [Yin's] team, [his] Max HP , Max Mana , Movement Speed and Critical Damage are increased [by 1/1/1%/1%, respectively]. (Original text: Forsaken Light: Since all the Forsaken Light members are present, your Max HP, Max Mana, Movement Speed, and Crit Damage are increased. )

name: Melissa
intro: Melissa, the Cursed Needle, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Cuddles, Giggles and Muddles.

abilities.name: Doll Buster
abilities.description: Buff Uh-oh, Melissa's taken apart another bunch of dolls! "My tailor shop excels at "fixing" dolls and "fixing" dolls. Am I right?, Muddles ?" (Melissa deals 125% damage to minions, creeps and summoned units.)

abilities.name: Falling!
abilities.description: Mobility Buff Melissa is falling… In your dreams! "Watch me slide forward and increase my Attack Speed for 3 seconds—Ah, that was just boring…" " Muddles , go that way!" " Cuddles , come here!" (The skill's cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds each time Melissa damages the enemy by attacking Muddles.) Skill terms Blink Movement ability that can pass through obstacles. ATK Speed It determines the attacking times (capped at 3 times) per second. Total current ATK Speed = Basic ATK Speed + Extra ATK Speed × ATK Speed Coefficient.

abilities.name: Eyes on You!
abilities.description: Debuff AOE Go, Muddles! "The plan's like this: Throw Muddles out to hold the bad guys, and then… I come on stage!" "I puncture the bad guys, while Giggles hit Muddles to punish the bad guys! Hee, fantastic!" (Muddles deals 250–400 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage on the first hit and links nearby [enemy heroes and summoned units] for up to 6 seconds. Linked enemies will be slowed by 60% that decays over 1.5 seconds and can break the link by moving out of the range. Muddles will return to Melissa early when she's too far away. When Muddles is present, you can tap the Attack Minion button to directly attack Muddles , though it cannot trigger the multi-hit damage.) Skill terms Physical Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Go Away!
abilities.description: Summon Buff Do you know? Hugs will give you the courage to face the darkness. " Cuddles , protect me! For 4 seconds, let no bad guys come close. Unless I say otherwise!" (When activated, the field knocks back Melissa creates a dome that continuously damages and repels enemies in the area and deals 500–900 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to them. It'll then continuously knock back enemies who attempt to enter the field. dealing 50–90 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and briefly slowing them [by 60%]. The field will also interrupt the enemy's movement skills unless they're immune to control effects . The field will move with Melissa once, when she's about to move out of boundary. Passive : Melissa's Physical & Magical Defense are increased by 3. (This effect is increased to 5 times when the skill is active.) Skill terms Knocked Back A state that prevents a target from moving, attacking, or using skills. The target will move away from the caster within the duration.

abilities.name: Forsaken Light
abilities.description: Since there are other Forsaken Light members on [Melissa's] team, [her] Max HP , Max Mana , Movement Speed and Critical Damage are increased [by 1/1/1%/1%, respectively]. (Original text: Forsaken Light: Since all the Forsaken Light members are present, your Max HP, Max Mana, Movement Speed, and Crit Damage are increased. )

name: Xavier
intro: Xavier, the Defier of Light, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Transcendence
abilities.description: Buff Xavier enhances his subsequent skills each time his skill hits an enemy hero. Stage I : Increases Movement Speed by 50% when subsequent skills hit, decaying over 1.2 seconds. Stage II : Width of subsequent skills will be greatly increased. Stage III : Skill Cooldown reduced by 4 seconds (36 seconds for the Ultimate ). At Stage III , Xavier enters the Transcendence state. Transcendence : All of Xavier's skills are enhanced to Stage III state for 5 seconds (this duration is extend by 1 second each time Xavier's skill hits an enemy). Skill terms CD The time needed for casting the skill one more time, which can be affected by CD Reduction (unless otherwise stated).

abilities.name: Infinite Extension
abilities.description: AOE Slow Xavier fires a Mystic Bullet that deals 480–650 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies it passes through. The Bullet's flying distance increases each time it hits an enemy or the Mystic Barrier (up to 5 times). Skill terms Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Mystic Field
abilities.description: AOE Xavier conjures a Mystic Barrier that lasts 5 seconds. Enemies that come into contact with the Barrier will take 220–340 and be slowed by 50%, while allies will gain extra Movement Speed that decays over 1.2 seconds. When hit by Xavier's other skills, the Barrier expands into a forbidden field for 3 seconds, dealing 220–340 (+65% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies within and immobilizing them for 1.2 seconds. Skill terms Immobilized A state that prevents a target from moving. The target can't use Blink within the duration. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%). Magic Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.

abilities.name: Dawning Light
abilities.description: Burst Buff Xavier unleashes a beam of Mystic magic that deals 600–1100 (+180% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies along its path. Once cast, he also directly enters the Transcendence state and resets the state's duration.

abilities.name: Forsaken Light
abilities.description: Since there are other Forsaken Light members on [Xavier's] team, [his] Max HP , Max Mana , Movement Speed and Critical Damage are increased [by 1/1/1%/1%, respectively]. (Original text: Forsaken Light: Since all the Forsaken Light members are present, your Max HP, Max Mana, Movement Speed, and Crit Damage are increased. )

name: Julian
intro: Julian, the Scarlet Raven, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Smith's Legacy
abilities.description: Buff After casting two different skills, Julian enhances his third skill. Casting the enhanced skill makes all his skills go on a 9–6 seconds cooldown (decreases with his level. After casting any skill, his Basic Attacks within the next 5 seconds to deal 100 (+100% Total Physical Attack) (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and pull the target toward him. Casting another skill extends the duration. Julian gains 15% extra Hybrid Lifesteal for 5 seconds each time he hits an enemy hero with his skills (up to 3 stacks). Skill terms Magic Basic Attack Deal Magic DMG to enemies. It can trigger ATK Effect and Magic Lifesteal.

abilities.name: Forsaken Light
abilities.description: Since there are other Forsaken Light members on [Julian's] team, [his] Max HP , Max Mana , Movement Speed and Critical Damage are increased [by 1/1/1%/1%, respectively]. (Original text: Forsaken Light: Since all the Forsaken Light members are present, your Max HP, Max Mana, Movement Speed, and Crit Damage are increased. )

name: Fredrinn
intro: Fredrinn, the Rogue Appraiser, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Crystalline Armor
abilities.description: Buff Heal Fredrinn gains 1 Combo Point that lasts 5 seconds each time his skill hits a non-minion enemy, up to 4 Combo Points. His Ultimate costs different numbers of Combo Points at different skill levels. Fredrinn stores 100% of the damage he receives as Crystal Energy , which decays after 5 seconds at a rate of 10% Max HP per second. Fredrinn can convert the stored Crystal Energy into HP by 20% of his damage dealt (10% for damage dealt to minions). Gaining a Combo Point resets the decaying timer.

abilities.name: Piercing Strike
abilities.description: Damage Fredrinn thrusts his sword in the target direction, dealing 125 (+7% Total HP) (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit and slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds. His next Basic Attack gains extra attack range and deals 85 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . [ skill duration needed ] This skill deals 200% damage to non-hero enemies.

abilities.name: Brave Assault
abilities.description: Mobility CC Fredrinn dashes in the target direction, dealing 140 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the first non-minion enemy hit. His next Basic Attack knocks the target airborne for 0.3 seconds. [ skill duration needed ]

abilities.name: Energy Eruption
abilities.description: CC AOE Fredrinn deals 210 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and taunts them for 1 second. Hitting a non-minion enemy grants Fredrinn 25 Physical and Magic Defense for 3 seconds and reduces the cooldowns of Piercing Strike and Brave Assault by 75%. This skill costs 1 Combo Point .

abilities.name: Appraiser's Wrath
abilities.description: Burst AOE Fredrinn slams his sword in the target direction (this skill can only be interrupted by Suppression), dealing 600 plus 21%-35% of his Crystal Energy as Physical Damage to enemies in fan-shaped area after a short delay. [ duration needed ] Enemies in the center of the area take 175% [critical] damage. This skill costs 3 Combo Points .

name: Joy
intro: Joy, the Flash of Miracle, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Humph, Joy's Angry!
abilities.description: Buff Joy becomes Angry! each time her skill hits a non-Minion enemy, dealing 100 (+80% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . Magic Damage and increasing her Movement Speed by 60% that decays over 4s (hitting the Leonin Crystal will also grant the Movement Speed effect). This effect has a cooldown of 4s for each target. Joy's Basic Attack will deal 65 (+65% Total Physical Attack) (+65% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage .

abilities.name: Look, Leonin Crystal!
abilities.description: Summon Joy summons a Leonin Crystal at the target location, dealing 200 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies and slowing them by 30% for 1s. The Leonin Crystal lasts 2 seconds and can be used as a springboard for her second skill, Meow, Rhythm of Joy! .

abilities.name: Meow, Rhythm of Joy!
abilities.description: Mobility Damage Joy dashes in the target direction, dealing 120 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to enemies in her path. Hitting an enemy or the Leonin Crystal allows Joy to cast this skill again within 0.8 seconds and gain 1 Beat Energy . Casting this skill on the beat increases the skill damage by 100% and grants a 80 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage shield that lasts 3s. This skill can be cast up to 4 times in succession.

abilities.name: Ha, Electrifying Beats!
abilities.description: AOE Speed Up Joy increases her Physical & Magic Defense by 15 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and gains 30% Movement Speed. Over the next 4s, she pulses 8 times, dealing 120 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage each time to nearby enemies. Each Meow, Rhythm of Joy! cast on the beat increases this skill's damage by 40%. If perfect rhythm is achieved by hitting every beat with Meow, Rhythm of Joy! , Joy also gains 40% Spell Vamp while this skill is active. This skill unlocks when Joy acquires Beat Energy . Casting this skill with 3 Beat Energy will remove all debuffs on Joy and make her immune to slow effects while this skill is active.

name: Novaria
intro: Novaria, the Star Rebel, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Star Trail
abilities.description: Buff Astral Spheres summoned by Novaria will continuously slow nearby enemies by 20% and grant vision of them [for 2 seconds].

abilities.name: Astral Meteor
abilities.description: Slow AOE Novaria summons an Astral Sphere at the target location. continuously dealing 75–150 (+25% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby enemies [six times]. After 2 seconds, the sphere will explode, dealing 260–385 (+50% Total Magic Power) (+enemy's 4%–6% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies, and increasing Astral Sphere's slow effect to 2.5 times the original slow effect (50% slow).

abilities.name: Astral Recall
abilities.description: Burst Buff Novaria summons an Astral Sphere at a distance and draws it towards her. At the same time, Novaria gains 20% Movement Speed and can pass through terrain. Passing through a wall will increase the Movement bonus to 60%. When the Astral Sphere reaches Novaria, she can launch it in a target direction within 5 seconds. The sphere will explode when hitting an enemy hero, dealing 260–385 (+50% Total Magic Power) (+enemy's 4%–6% Total HP) Magic Damage . The damage will increase based on the Astral Sphere's travel distance (starting from when the sphere is summoned) up to 2.5 times the original. Skill terms Ignore Obstacles Buff: Can pass through obstacles.

abilities.name: Astral Echo
abilities.description: Buff Novaria scatters Astral Echo in the target direction, briefly slowing enemy heroes hit by 50% (for approximately 0.8 seconds) while applying Astral Ring on them, increasing their hitbox by 2.5 times and revealing their surrounding area. This effect lasts 5 seconds. Skill terms Hitbox The contact area of a unit that can be hit by non-lock-on attacks.

name: Arlott
intro: Arlott, the Lone Lancer, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Demon Gaze
abilities.description: Buff Arlott possesses a demonic eye that will Mark enemy units near Arlott that become affected by control effects for 7s. The eye will also automatically Mark a nearby enemy hero every 7s.

abilities.name: Dauntless Strike
abilities.description: CC AOE Arlott swings his lance forward, dealing 200 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and briefly stunning the targets in the area. Targets hit by the further part of the AOE will be stunned for 1s instead.

abilities.name: Vengeance
abilities.description: Damage Mobility Arlott charges at an enemy and deals 160 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage (this skill cannot be interrupted during movement). If Arlott's target is Marked , this skill will deal double damage and refresh its cooldown , and restoring 0 (+90% Total Physical Attack) HP to Arlott (only restores 50% of that amount when used on a non-hero unit).

abilities.name: Final Slash
abilities.description: CC AOE Arlott cleaves in front of him, dealing 400 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to targets in the area and pushing them to the edge of the AOE and breifly revealing their location.

name: Ixia
intro: Ixia, the Arclight Outlaw, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Siphon Starlium
abilities.description: Damage Heal Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills apply a stack of Starlium Charge to enemies on hit. When Ixia performs a Basic Attack on an enemy with two stacks of Starlium Charge, the attack will consume the stacks and be replaced with Siphon Starlium , dealing (+150% Total Physical Attack) (+200 × Lifesteal) plus (+10 × Hero Level) Physical Damage to the target. Ixia recovers HP equal to the damage dealt by Siphon Starlium (only 20 (+100 × Lifesteal) % against non-hero units). Siphon Starlium can trigger on all enemies in front of Ixia that are within her Basic Attack range, but it cannot critically strike . Ixia's Basic Attacks cannot trigger Lifesteal .

abilities.name: Dual Beam
abilities.description: Burst Ixia fires 2 Starlium-charged energy beams along the ground in the target direction, dealing 120–225 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in a rectangular area and slowing enemy heroes by 40%. Upon hitting an enemy hero, Ixia also gains 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. Enemies hit by both beams will take double damage.

abilities.name: Star Helix
abilities.description: CC Ixia launches a canister of Starlium energy in the target direction, knocking back nearby enemies, and pulling enemies in range to the center line after a short delay (approximately 0.5 seconds) and dealing 200–300 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage .

abilities.name: Full Barrage
abilities.description: AOE Ixia disassembles her weapon into 6 smaller weapons and enters the Barrage state for 4 seconds. In this state, Ixia's Basic Attacks and skills can hit enemies in a large fan-shaped area but not outside of it. Ixia's Basic Attacks can hit up to 6 enemy units (prioritizes heroes), and Siphon Starlium will fire simultaneously with her normal Basic Attacks.

name: Nolan
intro: Nolan, the Cosmic Wayfinder, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Dimensional Rift
abilities.description: Damage The father who swore to protect his shining star. Nolan's skills will leave a Rift that lasts 5 seconds and slows enemies by 30%. When a rift comes into contact with another rift, they will activate and pull enemies to their center and deal 220 (+140% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage after a short delay. Each time a rift activation hits an enemy hero or Creep , Nolan will gain 15 Energy and heals 150 (+120% Extra Physical Attack) for himself. If an enemy is hit by multiple rift activations, the damage after the first hit will be reduced to 40%. Cosmic Leap: If Nolan does not deal or take damage for 5 seconds, he enhances his next Basic Attack to dash to the target, dealing (+120% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and leaving a rift. (Damage to and from Minions or Creeps will not prevent Nolan from getting this effect.) Skill terms Pull Target Displacement: Cannot interrupt skills or Blink.

abilities.name: Expansion
abilities.description: AOE The scholar that explored the edge of the universe. Nolan cuts a rectangular area in front of him with his cosmic gauge, dealing 230–480 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and leaving a rift at the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Gauge
abilities.description: Mobility The wayfinder that measured the distance of the star Nolan charges in the target direction and slashes with his cosmic gauge, dealing 70–220 (+13% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in his path and leaving a Rift .

abilities.name: Fracture
abilities.description: Burst The hero that finally returned home. Nolan slashes the target location 3 times, 120–180 (+50% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage with each slash while leaving 3 Rifts and slowing the target hit by 30% for 0.5s. The rifts will be activated automatically while Nolan dashes backwards.

name: Cici
intro: Cici, the Buoyant Performer, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Yoyo.

abilities.name: Performer's Delight
abilities.description: Buff Cici generates a stack of Delight after dealing damage, increasing her Movement Speed by 0.75% and Spell Vamp by 0.75% per stack up to 10 times, doubling the effects at full stacks.

abilities.name: Yo-Yo Blitz
abilities.description: Burst Cici uses Yoyo to continuously attack the nearest enemy within range (prioritizing heroes) for 3.5 seconds, hitting them up to 10 times and dealing Physical Damage equal to 60–85 plus 3–4.5 (+1.2% Extra Physical Attack) % of the target's Max HP per hit. Cici can move and use other skills during this attack. If there's no enemy hero within the range, Yoyo will attack Turrets or the Base instead. The skill deals 20% extra damage to Minions .

abilities.name: Buoyant Bounce
abilities.description: Mobility Cici leaps to a target location. If she lands on any unit (not including Turrets and Base ), she can leap again in the Joystick's direction. If she lands on an enemy with the first leap, she deals 200–300 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to them.

abilities.name: Curtain Call
abilities.description: CC Slow Cici throws Yoyo at the target enemy hero and links them with another nearby enemy hero, dealing 100 (+10% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage , slowing them by 30%, and pulling them together. During this time, Cici can use Yo-Yo Blitz to attack both linked targets at the same time. If only one is within the range of Yo-Yo Blitz, Cici will attack the target twice, but the damage of the second attack will be reduced to 25%~45%.

name: Chip
intro: Chip, the Phase Technician, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Snack Time!
abilities.description: Heal Yummy...yummy... Chips starts eating potato chips when out of combat, regenerating HP equal to 150 plus 45% after finishing a whole bag (requires 5 bites). After eating a bag of chips, Chip cannot eat again for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Crash Course
abilities.description: CC AOE Chip rams his hovercraft into the ground, dealing Magic Damage equal to 220–370 plus target's Max HP and applying Chip's Mark on enemy heroes hit. Chip gains a 300–800 (+60% Total Magic Power) shield upon hitting an enemy hero, which increases by 20% for each additional energy hero hit. Chip's next Basic Attack will become ranged and also hit all nearby enemies with Chip's Mark , detonating the mark to deal 200–350 (+40% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and stun each target for 0.6 seconds.

abilities.name: Overtime
abilities.description: Speed Up Sunshine and beach, I'm here! Chip rushes forward for 2 seconds, gaining speed until he reaches 65% extra Movement Speed , after which he maintains the max speed for 2 seconds. Chip's next Basic Attack will cause him to charge at the enemy, dealing 200–300 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and knocking them back slightly.

abilities.name: Shortcut
abilities.description: Teleport CC Get it done so we can get off work. Chip drops the Main Portal on an enemy hero, dealing 200–300 (+60% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Meanwhile, he creates Connecting Portals near allied heroes (excluding allies within 8 units of Chip) and behind the allied Base. The Main Portal and Connecting Portals last up to 10 seconds. Connecting Portal : Heroes can teleport from Connecting Portals to the Main Portal , or stand on the Main Portal for a period time to return to the Connecting Portal they came from. Main Portal : Deals 600–900 (+180% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to nearby targets after a delay and knocks them airborne for 0.8 seconds. The Main Portal inherits 80% of Chip's HP.

abilities.name: Why Walk?
abilities.description: Teleport Chip has 4 Beacons on the map. Chip eleport to any other Beacon .

name: Zhuxin
intro: Zhuxin, the Beacon of Spirits, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Crimson Butterflies
abilities.description: Buff Every time Zhuxin channels Lantern Flare , she converts the Mana spent into up to 15 Crimson Butterflies to follow her Spirit Lantern . After Zhuxin stops channeling Lantern Flare , the Crimson Butterflies will gradually disappear, each restoring 3% of her Max Mana. Zhuxin has a naturally high base Max Mana, but it doesn't scale with her level.

abilities.name: Fluttering Grace
abilities.description: AOE Buff | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zhuxin deals 150–210 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies in a fan-shaped area and applies 1 stack(s) of Soul Snare . Zhuxin also slows all enemy heroes hit by 20%–40% and gains 20%–40% of extra Movement Speed herself for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Lantern Flare
abilities.description: Damage CC | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Hold : Zhuxin can move the Spirit Lantern with the skill button, dealing 35–80 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to all enemies within range every 0.33 seconds ( Magic Power increases to 60% against Minions ) and applying Soul Snare to enemy heroes hit. Each time (wether it hits a unit or not) consuming 90 Mana . When an enemy hero has 10 stacks of Soul Snare, the Crimson Butterflies will capture them, pulling them airborne for 1 second. Release : Throws all captured enemies to the target location, dealing 200–400 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage + 10%-15% of target's Max HP to all enemies in the area. (If an enemy takes damage multiple times, subsequent damage taken will be reduced by 80%.) After a target is captured, Soul Snare cannot stack on them again for 4s. During this time, this skill deals 15% increased damage to that target.

abilities.name: Crimson Beacon
abilities.description: Shield Mobility | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zhuxin blinks to the target location while gaining a 400–700 (+100% Total Magic Power) shield . While flying, she creates a field around her for 6 seconds. The field deals 30–45 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applies 1 stack of Soul Snare to enemies every 0.5 seconds.

name: Suyou
intro: Suyou, the Mask of the Immortal, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Transient Immortal
abilities.description: Buff Tap-casting any skill will put Suyou in his Mortal form, grant him 40 Movement Speed and decreasing the interval between Basic Attacks . Hold-casting any skill will put Suyou in his Immortal form, increasing the damage of Basic Attacks to 125% and granting him 20% Physical Damage Reduction. In this form, for every 20 extra Physical Attack Suyou has, he gains 1% Physical Damage Reduction (up to 40%).

abilities.name: Blade Surge
abilities.description: Mobility CC Tap: Suyou throws his weapon in the target direction, dealing 250–330 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in its path. Suyou then blinks to the weapon's location, catches it, and performs a slash in the opposite direction, dealing 375–495 (+150% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage . Hold: Suyou channels the Immortal's power and charges in the target direction, dealing 250–330 (+100% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies along the path. When hitting an enemy hero, he stops and stuns enemies in a rectangular area in front for 0.6 seconds. The charge increase distance increases with the hold time. Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted.

abilities.name: Soul Sever
abilities.description: AOE Burst Tap: Suyou performs a sweeping attack with his weapon, dealing [300–492 (+200% Extra Physical Attack) (+target's 20% Lost HP) Physical Damage ] to enemies in a fan-shaped area. Hold: Suyou channels the Immortal's power to perform 3 cleaves in a fan-shaped area. The first two strikes deal 250–410 (+80% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage each, while the final strike deals 400–656 (+128% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage and recovers 150–230 (+50% Extra Physical Attack) HP for himself.

abilities.name: Evil Queller
abilities.description: Damage Debuff Tap: Suyou glides backward and swings his weapon in the target direction, dealing 420–580 (+120% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in a rectangular area and on his path back ward, and reducing their Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5 seconds. Hold: Suyou uses the Immortal's power to shoot a deadly arrow in the target direction, dealing 580–800 (+165% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the target hit. The range increases with the hold time. Suyou can be controlled while charging, but the skill cannot be interrupted.

name: Lukas
intro: Lukas, the Beast of Light, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Hero's Resolve
abilities.description: Buff Lukas gains 1 Resolve per second and an additional 2 Resolve when dealing damage to heroes. Lukas consumes 10 Resolve per second while in Sacred Beast form.

name: Kalea
intro: Kalea, the Surging Wave, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Surge of Life
abilities.description: Buff After casting a skill, Kalea creates a Water Zone on the ground. When Kalea casts a skill within this zone, she will absorb it to enhance her next three Basic Attacks with different effects: First Basic Attack: Kalea dashes to the target, dealing (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . Second Basic Attack: Kalea unleashes a flurry of attacks, dealing 300 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and recovering 120 (+10% Total HP) (+60% Total Magic Power) HP for herself and the nearby lowest HP ally. Third Basic Attack: Kalea uses her tail to strike the area around her target, dealing 100 (+100% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and creating a new Water Zone . Enhanced Basic Attacks are not affected by Attack Speed.

abilities.name: Wavebreaker
abilities.description: AOE Kalea slams her fist into the ground, creating a wave that deals 250 (+5% Total HP) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and slows them by 40% for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Tidal Strike
abilities.description: Mobility CC Kalea charges forward and body slams the first enemy hero she encounters, knocking them airborne for 0.6s while dealing 150 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage . If she collides with an obstacle or touches the edge of a Water Zone during her charge, Kalea will leap into the air. Cast the skill again to slam down at a target location, dealing 150 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and knocking enemies airborne for 0.6s.

abilities.name: Tsunami Slam
abilities.description: CC Kalea grabs an enemy hero with her tail and slams them down in the Joystick's direction, dealing 300 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the target and nearby enemies.

name: Zetian
intro: Zetian, the Celestial Empress, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Celestial Armament
abilities.description: Shield CC Phoenix Crown : When Zetian hits enemy heroes with Phoenix Strike or Phoenix Descent , she gains 0.5% Spell Vamp for 5s, stacking up to 10 times. Celestial Robe : The power of the Phoenix periodically protects Zetian, knocking back and stunning any enemy hero who dares approach her while dealing 90 (+10*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to them. She also gains a 300 (+20*Hero Level) (+50% Total Magic Power) Shield that lasts 3s. This effect has a 120s cooldown.

abilities.name: Phoenix Strike
abilities.description: Damage Speed Up | Spell Vamp Ratio: 100% Zetian unleashes a Phoenix Wave in the target direction. If it hits an enemy, she automatically casts another wave, up to 3 times. While casting, Zetian can move with 10% increased Movement Speed and can use other skills. The three Phoenix Waves deal 185 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage /185 (+50% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage /330 (+70% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage , respectively. The third wave hits a larger area and includes a small pull effect (not considered a control effect). This skill only has 80% Spell Vamp efficiency against Minions.

abilities.name: Phoenix Descent
abilities.description: Slow Debuff | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zetian summons a Phoenix Spirit at the target location, dealing 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a 50% Slow Effect to enemies in the area. The Phoenix Spirit hovers at the location for 3s, dealing 20 (+10% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage every 0.5s and reducing enemies' Magic Defense by 10%. While the Phoenix Spirit is active, Zetian can use this skill again to command it to charge toward a designated location, dealing 150 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and applying a <%Num8> Slow Effect upon arrival.

abilities.name: Fury of the Phoenix
abilities.description: CC Damage | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Zetian calls upon her divine mandate and the hearts of her people, granting all allied heroes 60% Movement Speed that gradually decays over 3s, while bringing divine retribution upon all enemy heroes, dealing 400 (+100% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage and stunning them for 1s. Zetian gains vision of all enemy heroes during this time. Zetian can cast other skills while channeling this skill.

name: Obsidia
intro: Obsidia, the Sovereign of Dark's End, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Return to Bone
abilities.description: Buff When Obsidia deals damage to enemies, she gains Bone Energy (Basic Attacks against non-hero units grant 1 Energy, against hero units grant 2 Energy, and skills grant 3 times the Energy. No Energy is gained from hitting creeps). When Bone Energy reaches 30, it forms a Bone Shard, up to 25 shards. When Obsidia uses Basic Attacks, all Bone Shards strike the target, each dealing (7% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and inheriting 7% Attack Effects.

abilities.name: Abyssal Bone Needle
abilities.description: Damage AOE Obsidia launches an Abyssal Bone Needle dealing 325 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies hit and triggering Return to Bone on the first enemy hero attack.

abilities.name: Phantom Shadowmeld
abilities.description: Speed Up Obsidia descends into the Abyss and enters Shadowmeld Form , gaining 500% Movement Speed for 0.3s.

abilities.name: Hunt of Bone
abilities.description: CC Mobility Obsidia shoots Bones of Wrath , in the target direction, dealing 125 (+60% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and briefly stunning the first enemy hero hit, and pulls herself near them. The Bones of Wrath then tether to the enemy, preventing Obsidia from moving more than 4 units away from them. The enemy cannot use displacement skills , and their movement will pull Obsidia along. During this time, Obsidia gains 5 temporary Bone Shard(s) . This effect lasts 3s. During this time, Obsidia can move through obstacles and use Basic Attacks while moving. Phantom Shadowmeld is enhanced, with its duration increased to 1s and cooldown reduced to 33%.

name: Sora
intro: Sora, the Shifting Cloud, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Mystic Surge
abilities.description: Buff Sora can ascend to Thunder or Torrent by using his Ultimate . After ascending, dealing damage to heroes or summoned units grants 1 stack of Cloudstep . At 5 stacks, he unlocks his True Art. Thunder : Converts 30% Max HP into Physical Attack at 10% ratio, adopting an assassin style. Torrent : Converts each point of Physical Attack into 10 Max HP , adopting a tank style.

name: Marcel
intro: Marcel, the Soul Photographer, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang , and is accompanied by Clemar.

abilities.name: Platinum Snap
abilities.description: Marcel's split soul. Clemar, enters the camera to freeze the moment. Marcel's Basic Attack deal 50 (+40% Total Physical Attack) (+40% Total Physical Defense) (+40% Total Magic Defense) Physical Damage but cannot Crit . He cannot benefit from extra Attack Speed . Extra HP is converted into 1.5% Hybrid Defense. Clemar automatically snaps photos of nearby enemy heroes, causing a brief Frozen Moment and dealing True Damage equal to 20 + 5% of their Max HP (can trigger attack effects). It also grants a shield of the same amount to Marcel and a nearby allied hero. This effect has a 12 seconds cooldown per target (Each Basic Attack by Marcel reduces that target's cooldown cooldown by 1 second.)

abilities.name: Framed Moment
abilities.description: AOE Clemar focuses on an area around Marcel, Slowing enemy heroes in range by 20%. After 2.5 seconds, he completes the shot, dealing 370–520 (+50% Total Physical Attack) (+100% Total Physical Defense) (+100% Total Magic Defense) Physical Damage to enemies within range and immobilizing them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Tracking Shot
abilities.description: Speed Up Artist inspiration time! Marcel enters Tracking Haste state for 3 seconds, gaining 15%-27.5% Movement Speed . This bonus increases to 75%-112.5% when moving toward an enemy hero. Use Again: Marcel dashes in the target direction, leaving a framing phantom behind. If Framed Moment is active, Clemar remains at the original location to continue shooting.
